novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Whether Meng Huo existed historically is a debated subject, though he does appear by name in Han Jin Chun Qiu and Hua Yang Guo Zhi, two sources cited by Pei Songzhi.

	 Pronunciation

	 Wade-Giles 
	King Mêng Huo

	 Other Names 
	Meng Huo

	 Name Notes 
	In pronunciation, Meng is his surname, Huo his given name. Da means “big/large” and Wang means King, for your information, Wang2 is only one word for King, Emperors have different titles, usually Huang2 Di4.

full_text:
King Meng Huo 孟獲大王
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
King Meng Huo (孟獲大王). Ruled Nanman after Shamoke’s death. Captured and released seven times by Kongming. King Meng Huo may not have existed in history. King Meng Huo was affiliated with Nanman.
